title: hierochloe odorata subsp. dahurica
intro: Hierochloe odorata subsp. dahurica, also known as sweet grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to certain parts of Asia and North America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of hierochloe odorata subsp. dahurica include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Hierochloe odorata subsp. dahurica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and calmness.
